name: New Consumer Electronics Categories Appear in Time for Christmas
description: Frictionless Data Package for Aberdeen Hot Topic study analyzing emerging consumer electronics categories for Christmas 2003, including the ZVUE pocket video player, Roku HD1000 HDTV media player, NEC fuel cell laptop, and market disruption from non-traditional CE companies.

publisher.name: Aberdeen Group
publisher.description: Technology market research and advisory firm

about.name: Consumer Electronics
about.description: Emerging consumer electronics product categories for the 2003 holiday season

about.name: ZVUE Pocket Video Player
about.description: Portable video/music player with 2.5-inch color display, $99 price point, SD card storage

about.name: Roku HD1000
about.description: HDTV digital media player with Linux OS, WiFi, multiple card slots, $499.99

about.name: NEC Fuel Cell Laptop
about.description: Prototype laptop powered by methanol/water fuel cell with 5-hour battery life

about.name: Sony UX40 Clié
about.description: PDA with video capability using 1GB Memory Stick Pro, total solution cost $1,359
